examples: Look, he wears a red belt, so he must be a very good judoka.
To win the contest a judoka must score an Ippon (a degree equalling 10 points) by using a successful technique.
Ryan and his older brother Reno, a decorated judoka in his own right, share a house there and Ryan was often his brother's sparring partner.
The 28-year-old judoka explains why winning a gold medal would mean everything to him -- and his father.
